shape_labels.https://securitybydesign.dev/ontology/ap: M1' — Slice coherence on claim (subsumes M2 for CO-level)
M4 — Mechanism ∈ CO chain (Mechanism-level claims; gap 1)
M4-card / referential integrity — claim target IRI resolves with matching level

violations.message: M4-card / referential integrity violation: the claim's ac:target_core_entity IRI does not resolve to an ontology entity whose rdf:type matches the claim's ac:level. Either the IRI is unknown (typo or IRI-scheme drift — e.g., emitting ac:co-ACO-IVF-002 instead of the canonical ac:ACO_IVF_002) or the entity exists at a different ontology level than the claim declares.

M4 violation: a Mechanism-level claim names a Mechanism that no CO in the declared slice implements (no CO in claim.slice has ac:objective_implemented_by_mechanism pointing at this Mechanism). The Mechanism may be slice-coherent on its own (M1') but is structurally orphan from the slice's CO set.

M3 violation: a Practice-level claim names a Practice that no CO in the declared slice realizes (no CO in claim.slice has ac:objective_realized_by_practice pointing at this Practice). The Practice may be slice-coherent on its own (M1') but is structurally orphan from the slice's CO set.

M1' violation: claim ac:slice does not equal the ontology's ac:belongsToSlice for the claim's target. The substrate has emitted a claim whose target lives in a different slice than the one declared. (Either the slice classifier or the target picker is wrong; not a SHACL-fixable data issue. See Decision 0003 Amendment 1 §A.M1'.)

M1' violation: claim ac:slice does not equal the ontology's ac:belongsToSlice for the claim's target. The substrate has emitted a claim whose target lives in a different slice than the one declared. (Either the slice classifier or the target picker is wrong; not a SHACL-fixable data issue. See Decision 0003 Amendment 1 §A.M1'.)

M1' violation: claim ac:slice does not equal the ontology's ac:belongsToSlice for the claim's target. The substrate has emitted a claim whose target lives in a different slice than the one declared. (Either the slice classifier or the target picker is wrong; not a SHACL-fixable data issue. See Decision 0003 Amendment 1 §A.M1'.)
M4-card: ac:Claim ac:similarity_score must be exactly one decimal in [0.0, 1.0].

apparatus_caveat: Model-invariant shapes only (M1' / M2 subsumed / M3 / M4 via CO chain / M4-card). Process-side invariants (M5 semantic warrant, P1' grounded-implies-claim) are NOT enforced here; consumers guarantee them by construction (Pydantic + assertions + tests). Apparatus tag appsec-core-v0-shapes.ttl is NOT modified by this validator; this file ALONGSIDE it adds claim-targeted shapes without touching ontology-targeted apparatus shapes.
